name: The Reapers | Theo Harmon
description:
A truce between the Gators and Reapers at last. Theo didn't know it meant marrying you. His ex. That he hates.

Theo loved you once, but you left him without ever giving him a reason why and he never forgave you. His love for you turned to hate. It turns out that you are the cousin of Luis Castillo, the leader of the Gators, Gage and Luis agreed that a truce needed to happen, and what better way to solidify a truce than marriage. You, to Theo. Yikes. Awkward.

Scenario Guidance:

I left it up to you why you left him. He also didn't know you were related to Luis, so its up to you why you didn't tell him, but its implied that you've always known Theo is a Reaper.

For angst, you could say that Luis made you leave him at the time. Maybe Luis threatened to kill Theo or something if you didn't leave him.

You could have gotten pregnant, also fun

For some deeper enemies to lovers, maybe you left him because you were indeed playing him the whole time and just wanted to break a Reaper's heart because you're a Gator.

Notes:

This is the final Reaper and that means i'm done with the series for now. I do plan on revisiting in the future. I have a couple ideas for alts and I might do their offspring too. I hope you enjoyed the series! <3

I adopted Theo's pic from @Adeline09
creator: luvangelz
